TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jim_Belushi, title = Jim_Belushi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jim_Belushi} }

S.FORM: panmwo:merge Jim Belushi James Adam Belushi (Jim Belushi), kinhtagan nya' ga, maki tay kawas 1954 tzyu byacing 15 ryax. James Adam Belushi, minkahul sa Chicago na Amirika, cyugal mtsswe kwara qutux ngasal nya. Jim Belushi hiya ga m' Engi. Jim Belushi hiya ga m' onggaku. Mintzyuwaw nya T'aring sa kawas 1980, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na Engi ru mqwas. Baqun anna ima pincyuwagan nya zyuwaw ga The Man with One Red Shoe (maki sa kawas 1985), About Last Night..., Salvador and Little Shop of Horrors (kwara kawas 1986). Maki sa kawas 1980, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. Maki sa kawas 2008 lga mhngaw ini ptzyuwaw la. Qnxan nya Jim Belushi maki tay kawas 1980 msqun ki Sandra Davenport, maki tay kawas 1988 t'alax. Jim Belushi maki tay kawas 1990 msqun ki Marjorie Bransfield, maki tay kawas 1992 t'alax. Jim Belushi maki tay kawas 1998 msqun ki Jennifer Sloan, tehuk misuw qani. Jim Belushi ini kekong. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors

panmwo:merge Jim Belushi James Adam Belushi (Jim Belushi), kinhtagan nya' ga, maki tay kawas 1954 tzyu byacing 15 ryax. James Adam Belushi, minkahul sa Chicago na Amirika, cyugal mtsswe kwara qutux ngasal nya. Jim Belushi hiya ga m' Engi. Jim Belushi hiya ga m' onggaku. Mintzyuwaw nya T'aring sa kawas 1980, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na Engi ru mqwas. Baqun anna ima pincyuwagan nya zyuwaw ga The Man with One Red Shoe (maki sa kawas 1985), About Last Night..., Salvador and Little Shop of Horrors (kwara kawas 1986). Maki sa kawas 1980, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. Maki sa kawas 2008 lga mhngaw ini ptzyuwaw la. Qnxan nya Jim Belushi maki tay kawas 1980 msqun ki Sandra Davenport, maki tay kawas 1988 t'alax. Jim Belushi maki tay kawas 1990 msqun ki Marjorie Bransfield, maki tay kawas 1992 t'alax. Jim Belushi maki tay kawas 1998 msqun ki Jennifer Sloan, tehuk misuw qani. Jim Belushi ini kekong. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: panmwo:merɣe *im βelus~ɕħi *ames~ɕ a*am βelus~ɕħi (*im βelus~ɕħi), kinħtaɣan njaʔ ɣa, maki taj kawas~ɕ **** tzju βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax. *ames~ɕ a*am βelus~ɕħi, minkaħul s~ɕa ʦ~ʨħiʦ~ʨaɣo na amirika, ʦ~ʨjuɣal mts~ɕs~ɕwe kwara qutux ŋas~ɕal nja. *im βelus~ɕħi ħija ɣa mʔ eŋi. *im βelus~ɕħi ħija ɣa mʔ oŋɣaku. mintzjuwaw nja tʔariŋ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na eŋi ru mqwas~ɕ. βaqun anna ima pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan nja zjuwaw ɣa tħe man witħ one re* s~ɕħoe (maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****), aβout las~ɕt niɣħt..., s~ɕal*a*or an* little s~ɕħop o* ħorrors~ɕ (kwara kawas~ɕ ****). maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi. maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa mħŋaw ini ptzjuwaw la. qnxan nja *im βelus~ɕħi maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki s~ɕan*ra *a*enport, maki taj kawas~ɕ **** tʔalax. *im βelus~ɕħi maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki marjorie βrans~ɕ*iel*, maki taj kawas~ɕ **** tʔalax. *im βelus~ɕħi maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki *enni*er s~ɕloan, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani. *im βelus~ɕħi ini kekoŋ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
